entry.title: Which app in the public cloud is SAP GUI's FB01
entry.content:
Hi Dear Experts,

I want to know which app in the public cloud has the same function as SAP GUI's FB01?

I currently want to perform a fixed asset acquisition. I believe there are two methods:
① Acquisition through procurement processes
② Direct entry acquisition in FI (using Tcode: FB01).

I want to test method ②, but now I can’t find an app in the public cloud system that is exactly like Tcode: FB01. In Application ：Post General Journal Entries（F0718）, I couldn’t find a place to directly enter asset information.

Please suggest.

Thank you very much.Best Regards!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Asset Management FIN Asset Accounting SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: I cannot maintain Form routine field in IS-REA partner
entry.content: I cannot maintain Form routine field in IS-REA partner in J7LE. This field is not editable

entry.title: Re: Validation using External Hooks in SAP Sales Cloud V2
entry.content:
@Harish_Singh 

Thanks for writing a much detailed blog but you missed to add some steps further in your blog

  1. ZMarketingCampaignID is extension custom field was created under Opportunity Service - Opp Item but you have placed that field in Products section in Opp .. so maybe you can provide Adaptation steps on adding it
  2. PostHook - Could you confirm can that be updated to Extension custom fields? As per help doc - It can be updated by PreHook but not through Post Hook.
  3. Notification - Can you provide detail steps on how Notifications appears with warning and error message to display.

entry.title: IW32 TECO TAKING QTY BY DEFAULT TO SCRAP
entry.content: when i do the TECO for my repair service order it is taking qty automatically to scrap instead of unrestricted, any idea what i am doing wrong ?

entry.title: Authorization - Restrict BP tcode
entry.content:
Hi experts,

we are looking for a solution to the following problem:

To create and modify business partners of the contact person type, we have created a role with authorization for B_BUPA_RLT with 000000 and BUP001.

In addition, certain users should also have change authorization for customer data (only for roles FLCU00 and FLCU01). However, if these users also have the role for contact persons, then change authorization for central customer data (GP role 000000) is also possible.

How can this be stopped?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: ABAP: Installation Guide
entry.content: Hello @jude_bradley, thank you for your comment! I do have an additional question how do you go about accesing an test server in the GUI, or how to host a server by oneself ? The guide https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/abap-cloud-developer-trial-2022-available-now/ba-p/13598069 eventho useful, the docker solution is too resource intense

entry.title: Issue while doing Neo Cloud Portal Site Migration to SAP BTP Workzone Standard Edition
entry.content:
Hello Community Members,

I am doing a migration of neo cloud portal site to workzone standard edition using the Migrating SAP Cloud Portal Sites (Neo Environment) to SAP Build Work Zone | SAP Help Portal .
When doing the migration steps : step 2 - convert downloaded zip file (exported cloud site zip file) to supported format in CF , i am facing an issue. Attaching the image of the issue : 

Can anyone help me to resolve this issue ?

Thanks.

SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition  SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment

entry.title: Re: Control and Command keys not swapped in SAP GUI for Java
entry.content:
Dear @fabianlupa 

Regarding customizing shortcuts in SAP GUI for Java, unfortunately this is not possible, as many of these shortcuts are set by the backend depending on the ABAP application from a given set in the menu painter. And overwriting Control for Command on the frontend side would cause conflicts with other already existing shortcuts provided by SAP GUI.

I understand your frustration regarding this topic, but unfortunately there is nothing we can do at frontend side as this is handled by the backend.

If you need further assistance with shortcuts I recommend you access the documentation below:

https://help.sap.com/docs/sap_gui_for_java/8cb7be1dd06242f48bcd643e33bbf31e/373cd67490b040d4b02e7f1a7047185f.html 

Best Regards,
Guilherme

entry.title: Re: How to setup Time Evaluation in Time Tracking
entry.content:
Hello, 

this is amazing article. Thank you for sharing this. Also in comments I found lot of valuable questions and answers.

I'd like to know your opinion, if these scenarios are possible to fulfill with Time Tracking license and current tools.

1. Scenario is Clock Time Positive - If employee clocked in and out multiple times and made 3 records of meal breaks during day, each with same time type. Would it be possible to valuate each record separately one by one and check breaks duration? And If any of these breaks won't last more than 30 minutes? I tried couple of ways, but as all these record were made on same day with same time type, system is aggregating all these breaks into 1 record. If each break lasted 15 minutes, as system aggregate all records into one, system thinks it lasted 45 minutes (3 x 15 mins).  Filter Single Record didn't work properly. Will appreciate any advice please. Thank you.

 

2. Scenario: is it possible to pull unpaired time events from SF somehow please? I found API GET /timeevents where are fields like "pairingStatusCode" which I don't know what contains. Are these single Clocks In stored somewhere where it is possible to pull it with Export, or Integration Center? Reason why we're looking for this is, that if employee worked more than 5 hours, we'd like to raise alert message to employee and manager that they should take a Meal Break. But as Clock in is unpaired time event I can't calculate time from Clock In till "now".

Thank you all in advance for any tips and advices.

Lukas

entry.title: Re: Streamlining Lookup Table generation with Excel VBA for Incentive Management Compensation Plan
entry.content:
Great tips there  Yogananda, We've built things like this in the past and it can be a good way of making life easier with Lookup tables.

 

Are there any official schemas for the Lookup Table XML available to get all the possible options when constructing the XML?

entry.title: Re: MaxDB dbanalyser dbanalyser_InstanceParameterCheck In...
entry.content:
Dear customer, yes the dbanalyzer_InstanceParameterCheck.cfg ist from July 2023, that is OK.

Could you please check in the log file the version - it should be version 1.105 .

You find the version string in the output of the database checker.

Regards Birgit Malik IMS SAP MaxDB

entry.title: Re: Condition type getting statistical in Billing.
entry.content: Go to V/06 - Enter your Condition type >  Control Data 2 > Check "Intercompany billing" check box. (Its for Intercompany condition type).

entry.title: Re: IW32 TECO TAKING QTY BY DEFAULT TO SCRAP

Our new version is SAPKH61729

The old version is  SAPKH61705

Thank you

Hagit

entry.title: Need to make Verification fields (product,qty,dest hu) optional in RF while doing Pick by HU
entry.content:
While doing the outbound picking process through RF transaction there are certain fields which are not adding any value in picking process and which will be extra efforts to the business users to do extra scan through RF

Process - Pick by HU

Extra fields to Scan - Product, Qty, Dest. HU (Highlighted in screenshot below)

 

We need these fields to be optional in the RF transaction

entry.title: Re: Error - App could not be opened either due to an inco...
entry.content: Hi, we were facing similar issue with our application.New application vector resolved our issue. You can also check the landscape configuration.

entry.title: Two-Tier ERP: SAP IBP integration with Subsidiary-HQ model
entry.content:
SAP’s Two-Tier ERP strategy with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition offers headquarter-subsidiary, central services, supply chain ecosystem deployment models enabling business and IT to work together to build sustainable, scalable solutions providing all benefits of cloud deployment – agility, standardization and low total cost of ownership (TCO) – while maximizing existing investments in their ERP systems.

The two-tier model can be adopted by businesses who have already deployed tier 1 on their existing systems like the ECC or SAP S4/HANA private cloud and looking to deploy the 2nd tier to S4/HANA public cloud.

 

 

Business Scenario:

Integrated Business planning (IBP) on a two-tier model can specifically be applied in scenarios where the headquarters (HQ) is responsible for overall demand aggregation and global supply chain strategy, while regional subsidiaries handle local sales forecasts based on market conditions. The use case for this could be with industries such as consumer electronics, automotive parts, or pharmaceuticals with regional demand variations or FMCG companies where HQ maintains planning integrity, but subsidiaries influence short-term demand signals.

Process Steps:

One of the key criteria for a simple demand planning scenario in the 2-tier setup is the master data and transactional data sync with IBP.

 

Detailed steps are as follows:

  1. Integrate master data such as product, location and customer master from the Headquarters (Private cloud) to IBP using SAP Cloud Platform Integration for data services (SAP CI-DS)
  2. Integrate transactional data such as the historical sales order from both the public and private clouds to IBP using iflows (CI) and CI-DS respectively.
  3. The delta of two sales order numbers (Actuals sales quantity) is then used to run the forecasting algorithm in IBP.
  4. IBP captures the total demand quantity, which is sent back as Planned Independent Requirements (PIRs) to the Headquarters (Private cloud) for generation of production orders.

Business Benefits:

  • Local teams add market intelligence to statistically driven HQ forecasts, resulting in better demand signal accuracy.
  • SAP IBP ensures a harmonized demand planning process, reducing inconsistencies between regions.
  • HQ and subsidiaries can collaborate in real time on the same planning data, enabling quick alignment.
  • HQ can own macro-level forecasting and strategy, while subsidiaries focus on operational/tactical forecast adjustments—reducing micromanagement and empowering local teams.
  • Clear roles and responsibilities improve data quality and accountability, as the model defines ownership of planning at each organizational level.
  • Workflow and collaboration features in SAP IBP (e.g., Excel add-in, task management) allow faster alignment between HQ and subsidiaries on consensus forecast.

Integration Setup:

Reference links:

SAP ERP and SAP IBP technical integration using CI-DS.

How to use SAP Cloud Integration for Data Services (CI-DS) to load data from S/4HANA with Generic Extractor – Part 1

How to use SAP Cloud Integration for Data Services (CI-DS) to load data from S/4HANA with Generic Extractor – Part 2

Getting Started with iFlows in SAP Integration Sui... - SAP Community

Overview | SAP IBP - Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Conclusion:

Product manufactured at the factory location or the headquarters for their subsidiaries, calls for end to end visibility of planning and timely execution of supply chain. Based on the demand forecasting/planning at the subsidiary side, manufacturer at headquarters can generate right production orders to prevent over/under supply scenarios.

entry.title: Anyone aware about shipping readiness check API which can help to get it done through RF ?
entry.content:
Anyone aware about shipping readiness check API which can help to get it done through RF?

We have to make the outbound delivery shipping readiness to be done in background while doing PGI through RF,

Any possibilities or API for same ?

entry.title: Re: Process Variant
entry.content:
Hello Prasad,

Onboarding tasks such as: RNHD , PDC , CDC , Compliance, E-signature, primary and secondary new hire tasks, are assigned based on the Process Variant.

If the steps to be taken from the onbordees are the same, and in the same order for all onbordees globally, then they might not benefit from having different Process Variants.

If onbordees from different countries are not required to complete the same steps, then different Process Variants will be required.
Process Variant Manager

Kind Regards,
Noemi

entry.title: Re: Object page FIORI element save Operation message
entry.content:
Hello All,

In case of V4 application the variable name which we need to maintain in i18n file has changed. We need to maintain text for i18n key C_TRANSACTION_HELPER_OBJECT_SAVED .

Below thread has more details and i18n keys for remaining standard messages/texts.
https://ui5.sap.com/#/topic/b8cb649973534f08a6047692f8c6830d

Regards,

Kalyani.

Even I am facing the same issue. What's weird is this end-to-end setup was working for me some time back, and I was able to launch my app tile from consumer subaccount. However, suddenly, with no updates/modifications done from my end, I started getting the error today.

Is there a known resolution for this?

Thanks in advance!

entry.content:

When i use it in the story, I see only the selected default member (# unassigned). I tried selecting a state, and I see only that member and also the data is not filtering - it shows for complete hierarchy.

I have attached the screenshots. Am I missing something?

entry.title: Re: Understanding Joule - (Step #6) Document Grounding in Joule
entry.content:
Great series of Blogs - thanks.
I have a complex query about document grounding

Suppose we have polices relating to x, y and z
At a Group level policies Gx, Gy & Gz in repository Rep_G
At subsidiary unit A we have policy Ax in Rep_A superceding Gx
At subsidiary unit B we have policy Bx and Bz in Rep_B superceding Gx and Gz
Subsidiary unit C has no local policies

So for employees in A:             Ax, Gy and Gz apply
So for employees in B:             Bx, Gy and Bz apply
So for employees in C:             Gx, Gy and Gz apply

How would this be set up so Joule knows which policies apply
(or is this too complex a task?)

entry.title: Re: IW32 TECO TAKING QTY BY DEFAULT TO SCRAP
entry.content: there is nothing in the component status

entry.title: Re: Where the email showing up on invoice coming from?
entry.content:
Resolution

For adding the address to the company code, please use SSCUI 105651 - Edit Addresses for Company Codes.

Please follow the steps below:

  1. Go to the CBC Workspace
  2. Go to Configuration Activities;
  3. Open SSCUI 105651 - Edit Addresses for Company Codes
  4. Select 2nd company code by clicking the checkbox;
  5. Click the address button at the top.

SAP Help Portal: Setting Up Organizational Structure 

Please note that once an organizational unit is created, only its name and address are changeable. It cannot be deleted or unassigned.

entry.title: Re: Validation using External Hooks in SAP Sales Cloud V2
entry.content:
@Harish_Singh,

Thank you for writing this blog, it actually helped me to start with writing my CAP Project extensions for SCV2.

In addition to the content in the blog, I wanted to understand how the CDS action would be structured for an Autoflow Webhook triggered from SCV2 system. If you do know how this is done, please let me know.

For example, in the blog you have written it as follows:

 action prehook(entity : String, beforeImage : object, currentImage : object, context : object, userId : String, skipValidations : Boolean, isDryRun : Boolean, employeeId : String) returns object;

What are the request body parameters required in an Autoflow Webhook?
I'd really appreciate your insights, thanks again for writing the blog.

entry.title: 🚀 Change Project in SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 (V2)
entry.content:
🚀 How to Execute a Change Project in SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 (V2): Transporting Configuration Between Test and Production

With the release of SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 (V2), SAP continues to modernize its CRM landscape, delivering a clean, scalable, and intuitive user experience. One critical area of focus for implementation teams is the ability to transport configurations safely and effectively between environments—especially from Test (Quality Assurance) to Production.
In this blog, we’ll guide you through how to execute a Change Project in SAP Sales Cloud V2, providing a step-by-step walkthrough, important considerations, and best practices for a successful transport process.

🔧What Is a Change Project in SAP Sales Cloud V2?
A Change Project in SAP Sales Cloud V2 is a structured method for transporting configuration changes between systems. It supports a multi-tier architecture, allowing you to define one source system and multiple target systemsfor a given customer ID.
Think of it as a container for tested changes—ensuring only validated configurations are promoted to production.

✅Pre-requisites
Before starting your transport, ensure the following:
1. Both Test and Production systems are maintained under
Settings > All Settings > Change Project > Administration
2. You have administrator rights in both systems.

🛠️ Step-by-Step Guide: Executing a Change Project

🔹Step 1: Set Target System
In the Test (source) system, navigate to: Settings > All Settings > Change Project > Administration
Set the System Type of your Production system to "Target" in the system settings table.



💡Note: When you initiate the Initial Load, it captures all current changes in a service before the Change Project is created. This step must be repeated for each individual service.
Currently supported services:
• Extension
• Mashup

⚠️Known Limitations (Extensibility Service)
The Extensibility Administration includes Custom Fields, Field Attributes, and Data Privacy, but currently does notsupport:
• Custom Logic (Dynamic Properties, Validations, Determinations, External Hooks)
• Assignment Rules
• Custom Logic Administration
• Custom Code Lists / Restrictions
• Custom Services
• Workspace Sequence
• Language Adaptation

⚠️Special Case: Mashup Service
When transporting a mashup, the URL field is not transported and stays empty in the target system. As a result, users may see a warning message.
To resolve this:
• Manually enter the URL in the Production system.
• To enable this feature long-term, create a support case with component CEC-CRM-PM-PF and the subject:
“Enable URL Editing for Transported Mashups”.

🔹Step 2: Start Initial Load (Extensibility Service)
Once the target system is configured, initiate the Initial Load for the Extensibility Service.
⚠️Ignore the Change Project status for now—continue to the next steps.

🔹Step 3: Publish Change Project
In the Test (source) system, navigate to:
Settings > All Settings > Change Project > Change Project > Publish Change Project

🔹Step 4: Transport Change Project
Still in the Test system, go to:
Settings > All Settings > Change Project > Change Project > Transport

🔹Step 5: Activate in Target System
In the Production (target) system:
Settings > All Settings > Change Project > Change Project > Activate Change Project

🎉Congratulations! You have successfully executed a Change Project in SAP Sales Cloud V2 and transported your configuration to the Production system.

🔄Stay Up to Date
Just like any software product, SAP Sales Cloud V2 is continuously evolving. Additional services and enhancementsare on the roadmap. To stay current with new capabilities, regularly check the SAP Roadmap Explorer.

entry.title: Join Our Next Espresso Session on Accelerating Business Transformation with the Integrated Toolchain
entry.content:
Join us for the upcoming espresso session to discover how SAP's powerful toolchain, combined with industry-specific content, can accelerate transformation projects in the energy and utilities industries.

 

 

 

 

 

 

Here’s what you can look forward to:

 ⁉️ Why Attend?

  • Optimize Transformation Projects: Learn how SAP Signavio and SAP LeanIX can streamline your transformation initiatives, ensuring efficiency and success
  • Seamless Integration: Explore how these tools work together to maximize customer value and deliver comprehensive business solutions.

💡 What You Will Learn:

  • How SAP Signavio can enhance process analysis and modeling, driving operational excellence.
  • The ways SAP LeanIX can manage your application landscape effectively, providing a clear overview and optimized IT architecture.
  • How to leverage industry-specific content to accelerate your transformation journey, ensuring quicker results and minimum risk.

🎤 Meet Our Speakers:

- Julia Dorothee Meyer, Product Expert at Global Content Group, SAP,  brings invaluable insights and expertise in global content management, aiding in process optimization and transformation initiatives.
- Till Trautewig - Process Expert at SAP with extensive experience in process management, will share practical strategies for integrating SAP Signavio and SAP LeanIX in your transformation projects.

🔔 Save the Date and Register

Date: Wednesday, July 02, 2025 

Time: 4:00 PM CET  

Duration: 30 minutes

🤝 We look forward to seeing you at our espresso session!

Join us to explore how SAP's integrated toolchain can revolutionize your business transformation initiatives, leveraging industry-specific content for maximum value!

entry.title: Re: Fiori Launchpad on Cloud Foundry and multiple apps in...

Part 2: Multiple Apps with a Shared Reuse Library

entry.title: Re: Employee Sign In issue while accessing Internal Caree...
entry.content:
For us it was the "Note" that we missed

To ensure that IAS works as expected, make sure you use the same values for the Subject Name Identifier and Conditional Authentication fields across all three configurations.

entry.title: Important lessons from SAP SAPPHIRE Orlando 2025(Virtual) focusing Data, AI & Sustainability
entry.content:
Thank you, @moshe , for the initiative in involving community members to discuss the SAPPHIRE key learning points. I've tried to set my understanding down. Would be happy to have feedback and improvise further. 

Businesses are turning to artificial intelligence more and more as the digital transformation path speeds at an unheard-of rate to release fresh degrees of efficiency, insight, and creativity. SAP presented its audacious vision for the future of intelligent business at SAP SAPPHIRE Orlando, based on the seamless integration of artificial intelligence, a uniform data foundation via the SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC), and a strong commitment to sustainability. This seminar highlighted how SAP helps companies to fully utilize their data, including artificial intelligence right into main business operations, and satisfy rising social, environmental, and governance (ESG) needs. We will discuss the main lessons from SAPPHIRE 2025 in this blog, including SAP's advancements in artificial intelligence, BDC, the SAP Knowledge Graph, and sustainability solutions changing enterprise data management and producing smarter, more responsible business outcomes.

1.1 SAP Business Data Cloud: The Consolidated Foundation for Business Integration and Artificial Intelligence
SAP's artificial intelligence strategy revolves on the Business Data Cloud, an industrial-grade data mesh integrating data from SAP's vast portfolio and outside sources into a single, trusted semantic layer. From on-site systems, cloud apps, and outside partners to structured and unstructured data, BDC combines to provide accurate forecasting, simplified reporting, and AI-driven insights that support agile decision-making.

Refer to Data Products in SAP Business Data Cloud | SAP Architecture Center by Uma Anbazhagan, Jason Luo, James Rapp, Peter Schmidt

figure : This diagram illustrates how consumers discover, integrate, and access data products.

Scenarios analysis : 

Imagine a CFO who following a quarterly review must rapidly evaluate working capital and cash flow. Without waiting for hand-written reports, she accesses real-time financial insights, finds bottlenecks, and projects cash flow scenarios using BDC's prebuilt data products and dynamic dashboards. This shows how BDC turns unprocessable data into useful intelligence therefore enabling quicker, data-driven decisions.
Standardizing data across SAP systems including finance, supply chain, procurement, and HR into a uniform data model is one of BDC's strengths; another is integrating outside data for a complete corporate picture.

Strength:

• Directly supporting sophisticated analytics and machine learning on data with a business context.
• Using relationships with Adobe, Moody's, Thomson Reuters, and others to create intelligent applications atop BDC, hence enabling an open environment.

My Next learning focus was on 

1.2. How SAP Knowledge Graph Improves AI Understanding and Provides a Unified Data Foundation for Artificial Intelligence?

Embedded SAP Knowledge Graph, which serves as the semantic backbone linking data, metadata, and business processes, is fundamental component of BDC's power. Collectively, they provide a consistent, trustworthy, semantically enhanced data platform that enables artificial intelligence to provide accurate, context-aware insights and automation.
Building an AI Unified Data Foundation
Together with outside systems, BDC harmonizes data from SAP applications such S/4HANA, SuccessFactors, and Ariba into a single, uniform semantic layer. Both organized and unstructured data are included in this consolidation to enable flawless integration all across the company.

Key features to explore: Standardizing several datasets into a cohesive model that maintains business meaning and linkages is known as semantic data harmony.
• Designed Data Products: Providing fast accelerating AI model development ready-to-use, premium datasets.
Native integration with SAP Dataphere and Databricks facilitates the whole AI lifecycle.
For reliable artificial intelligence, data quality, lineage, security, and compliance must all be guaranteed.
• Real-Time Adaptation: Let artificial intelligence programs dynamically automate tasks and learn constantly.
• Support for Generative AI and Large Language Models (LLMs) by means of a single source of truth so strengthening AI agents such as SAP's Joule copilot.

You can further learn from 

a. Exploring SAP Knowledge Graph

b. Illustrating the Role of SAP Datasphere in SAP Business Data Clou

Figure: SAP Knowledge Graph enhances the integration and understanding of complex business data within SAP systems.

SAP's "Business AI" concept centers on immediately embedding artificial intelligence capabilities into key applications to automate regular chores and maintain human control. From 230 to a projected 400 by mid-2025, the number of embedded artificial intelligence scenarios is fast rising and spans domains including expense management, sourcing, work order creation, and employee self-service.

One of the most exciting reveals is SAP Sapphire Orlando Keynote: Bring Out Your Best | SAP News Center

2. The SAP Flywheel: AI, Data, and Applications Synergistically

SAP developed the "Flywheel" idea to show how apps create real-time business data that feeds embedded artificial intelligence to improve decisions and AI improves applications in turn. SAP's unified cloud suite and BDC's harmonic data foundation thus provide a compounding cycle of business value.
The SAP Flywheel shows the virtuous cycle whereby applications create real-time business data, embedded artificial intelligence uses this data to better decision-making, and AI improvements feed back into applications—creating constant, compounding business value.

The last not the least  Although I have been upskilling in multiple SAP business and technical area throughout the years, sustainability offers me motivation outside of the workplace. And here are the main points of interest on SAP sustainability.

3. SAP's Sustainability Emphasizing Intelligent Solutions to Drive ESG

SAP highlighted its increasing sustainability commitment at SAPPHIRE Orlando 2025, introducing fresh tools and data products meant to enable companies to reach social, environmental, and governance (ESG) targets. Deeply connected with the Business Data Cloud, SAP's sustainability solutions help businesses to gather, harmonize, and evaluate sustainability data in tandem with operational measurements.
Important advances in sustainability include:
• SAP Green Ledger: Incorporates environmental impact and carbon emissions tracking straight inside corporate transactions by including sustainability accounting into financial systems.

• SAP Product Footprint Management:  Calculations made utilizing current ERP data can help to embed footprint results back into company processes, therefore influencing decision-making. Driven by artificial intelligence, use supplier specific footprints and increase accuracy with emission factor mapping. computing a scale carbon footprint Calculate and control scope 1, 2, and 3 corporate, value chain, and product carbon footprints. Get a total, thorough understanding of your carbon footprint data from all over your value chain.

• Sustainability Control Tower: An intelligent tool driven by BDC that offers real-time ESG metric visibility, therefore enabling companies to track regulatory compliance and development toward sustainability targets.

All available within the one data fabric, sustainability data products are curated datasets encompassing environment, health, and safety (EHS) compliance, carbon footprint, and social responsibility metrics.

I would encourage more people to explore SAP sustainability products and how business processes and technical areas can be improvised to incorporate sustainability from the very start of the business.

Further, you can learn from, 

Explaining key features of SAP Green Ledger 

Administering Sustainability Control Tower | SAP Learning

Sustainable operations with AI powered SAP Environment, Health and Safety (EHS) - YouTube

4. Conclusion
SAP SAPPHIRE Orlando 2025 made abundantly evident that data-driven, highly integrated with sustainability at its center, artificial intelligence-powered enterprise technology is what will shape business technologies going forward. Enhanced by the SAP Knowledge Graph and supported by intelligent sustainability solutions, the SAP Business Data Cloud forms a strong semantic basis that lets artificial intelligence really grasp intricate business data and linkages while allowing companies to fulfill their ESG obligations. This basis is changing how companies run, make decisions, develop, and help to create a more sustainable future along with SAP's growing array of embedded AI applications and intelligent automation technologies. SAP's consistent approach presents a convincing roadmap to unlock new business value, encourage agility, and create a resilient, responsible, and intelligent corporation fit for the challenges of tomorrow as companies get ready for the next wave of digital transformation.

Would request @KunalBansal , @sayontan098  to share their learnings. 

Thank you once again..

entry.title: Re: How to move amount when update new GL in SAC
entry.content:
@Krisna2101 

You can use a Copy Data Action to copy from Old Account to New Account and later remove the amount from old account. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/a27d8405ac9b4e7bb8e50e8e70ba18a2.html?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION&version=release&q=Copy%20Data%20Action#adding-a-copy-step

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: SAC roles/teams issue
entry.content: You can try removing all roles and assign back one by one and see which role is giving them access to view all data.

entry.title: Update Exchange rate when posting a document
entry.content: When I´m trying to post a document with a foreign currency, it uses an old exchange rate instead of the most recent one imported to TCURR. Everywhere it´s said that the application of the most recent exchange rate should be automatic but it´s not the case. Can anyone help please?

entry.title: RCM: Job Requisition Operator Team permissions.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have received a requirement from our client to implement region-based access control for Job Requisitions. Specifically, users from a particular region should only be able to access Job Requisitions created for that region.

Currently, we are using a single Job Requisition Template that is shared across multiple countries. The challenge is to configure permissions so that users from one region can view and manage only the Job Requisitions relevant to their region, and not those created for other regions.

In this case, we suggested Users to be selected through Groups by adding the group through "Manage Recruiting Team Settings" as default. But our clients denied this. Then we suggested, make a personal preferences.This is also denied.

  • Users should only be able to view Job Requisitions related to that region, not all regions job requisitions.

Is this level of access restriction possible within our current setup RCM?

Best Regards,
Venkatesh.

entry.title: Re: Activating Unified Data Model for CSB - a complete beginners guide
entry.content:
Hi Michele,

yes, there was something in the new release. More details here: Migrating Job Location Data for the Unified Data Model | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Call SAP Digital Manufacturing Production Processes via REST API
entry.content:
Hi @Nikhil2606 , by default all calls are executed asynchronously, so no output is provided. To see the output, you must define 'async' param as 'false', see example below:

Hope it helps! Br, Manoel

entry.title: Implemented OAuth2 Policy in APIM Integration suite successfully, but Unable to Access the iflow.
entry.content:
I created a new api proxy for Oauth token (https://2we321f7trial-trial.integrationsuitetrial-apim.us10.hana.ondemand.com:443/2we321f7trial/newoauth/newtoken)  added a oAuth2 policy Named "GenerateOAuthToken" to Generate the token and other api proxy for an iflow (https://2we321f7trial-trial.integrationsuitetrial-apim.us10.hana.ondemand.com:443/2we321f7trial/ikramSendData) used oAuth2 policy named "VerifyOAuthAccessToken" to verify the token, I am able to generate the AccessToken from Postman using the oAuth2 Authorization, after that   payload will be sent to the IFLOW, but after Generating the  access Token and using it ,when I am sending the data it is  giving the error "401 Unauthorized"

Code for oAuth2 policy "GenerateOAuthToken" 

<OAuthV2 async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" XMLNS="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt"><Operation>GenerateAccessToken</Operation>

<GenerateResponse enabled="true"/>

    <SupportedGrantTypes>

           <GrantType>client_credentials</GrantType>

       </SupportedGrantTypes>

   <Tokens/>

</OAuthV2>

Code for oAuth2 policy "GenerateOAuthToken" 

<OAuthV2 async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" XMLNS="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">

  <Operation>VerifyAccessToken</Operation>

   <GenerateResponse enabled="true"/><SupportedGrantTypes/>

<Tokens/>

</OAuthV2>

Please suggest remedy to solve 401 UnAuthorized, so that the integration IFLOW  is accessed and data is sent.

entry.title: Does Skill Inference in SuccessFactors Auto-Generate Attribute Details from External Catalogs?
entry.content:
Hello,

I’ve been reviewing the following official resources related to SAP SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub and its AI-based skill inference capabilities from Continuous Performance Management (CPM) data:

  • Blog post:
    https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blog-posts-by-sap/talent-intelligence-hub-2024-updates-and-behind-the-scenes/bc-p/13903648

  • Demo video:
    https://sapvideo.cfapps.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com/?entry_id=1_hcv94fy5

  • Help Portal:
    https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-platform/using-talent-intelligence-hub/recommending-skills-based-on-continuous-performance-management-data?locale=en-US

I have a few questions regarding the actual behavior and implementation details, and I’d greatly appreciate any clarification or insights from the community.

  1. Based on the resources above, I understand that AI can recommend skills based on data from the achievements, activities, or feedback sections of Continuous Performance Management. I’d like to confirm if there are any other reference materials or important considerations that users should be aware of regarding this functionality.

  2. It’s also stated that external skill catalogs such as O*NET and ESCO are used to support skill inference. I understand this to be true at least conceptually, but I’d like to better understand to what extent these catalogs are actually used in current implementations—for example, whether they are directly matched during inference, or used only for classification or reference.

  3. My main question is: When a new skill is inferred by the AI, is only the skill name (i.e., the identifier in the attribute library) added, or does the system also automatically populate other metadata—such as definitions, descriptions, or behavioral indicators—based on external catalogs like ESCO?
    I have not been able to find concrete information on whether full skill profiles are auto-generated or only the label is suggested.

entry.title: Re: Unable to create "Switch-Based Feature Toggles"
entry.content:
However, you can use the SFW to achieve the same as with feature toggles. In fact, feature toggles use the SFW at the end.

Differences are:

  • SFW tools are available in OnPrem only.
  • SFW does not allow to activate single business functions. Only the complete system setting can be activated which includes all changes to the switch states of business functions.
  • SFW does not allow user-dependent switching.

entry.title: Error Log - Pay Comp Recurring Calc Columns
entry.content:
Hi @YSE-1 

Could you please take a look at this instance and let me know why the cube keeps failing? 

I looked in the error log, it keeps saying calc column 9, 10, 11, 12, etc. for pay comp recurring, but we don't have anything like this in the system, nor it was in the manual implementation guide. So many calculated columns for pay comp recurring...why it keeps flagging them as errors? 

Also, besides this community forum, where can we get more expert help for the technical implementation because it looks like at the moment it's beyond our capabilities. When we did a ticket to SAP, they recommended the forum for our queries. Where could we get more 1on1 with screenshare sessions to resolve some of the config issues that we are facing? 

Thank you!

SAP SuccessFactors Workforce Analytics

entry.title: Re: Error while adding a goal - Cannot set properties of...
entry.content:
Good morning everyone,

Adding our voice to this thread: we're experiencing the exact same problem.

We've already gone through the troubleshooting steps outlined here and, unfortunately, haven't found a resolution.

I have an open SAP ticket on this matter, but it's still pending a response. As we're in a critical phase of our Goal Setting cycle, this issue is causing significant internal disruption and a high volume of inquiries.

If anyone has had success in resolving this or receives an update from SAP, please share your insights here. I will certainly post any breakthroughs from our end as well.

Thank you for your collaboration.

entry.title: Re: Maintenance plan schedule calls only on Saturdays and sundays
entry.content: how we can schedule in monthly, pls explain

entry.title: Down Payment Invoices (Advance Payment Invoices) in France
entry.content:
Hello,
since 01.01.2023 the law forces French companies to issue advance invoices (down payment invoices) when payment is received before goods are delivered. 

Quote:(...)When a down payment is collected, an invoice must be issued. This invoice must indicate the amount of VAT (in accordance with article 289 of the CGI) as well as the usual information of any invoice, such as the mention “INVOICE”, the number, the date and the identification of the parties. (...) (...)The Value Added Tax must be paid to the tax authorities on the CA3 of the monthin which the advance payment is received.(....)

In some countries, there is a predefined scenario for advance payments invoices (e.g. Poland or Slovakia), where there is a dedicated billing document type e.g. FAF to generate such an downpayment invoice and post accordingly in FI.

How should the creation of such advance payment invoices in France be handled in SAP S/4HANA, Public Cloud Edition? What type of billing document/system process should we use, bearing in mind that we need not only to issue an invoice & send a printout to the customer, but also to show it in the VAT return (CA3)?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

Great thanks in advance for your support.

entry.title: Proration Calculation-Monthly Salary
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I hope this message finds you well.

I am attaching an image of the PCR I have written as part of a payroll configuration task. The scenario is as follows:

An employee was hired on June 10, 2025, with a monthly salary of 50,000. As per the requirement, the employee should be paid for 20 days of work, which amounts to approximately 33,333. However, during the simulation run, the system calculates and displays a salary of 35,714 instead.

It appears the system is overriding the expected value, and I would appreciate your guidance on identifying where the correction is needed within the schema or PCR logic to ensure accurate proration of salary based on actual working days.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: We cannot copy the number range RF_BELEG by subobject...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you very much for your question!

Does the following blog provide the information you're looking for?

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blog-posts-by-sap/create-and-export-a-custom-number-range-in-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition/ba-p/13954872

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Re: SLD, License and Extension Manager Error Installing S...
entry.content:
Dear MukeshSingh

For Upgrade analysis please attach the 3 log files and the relevant information from Note 2380811 and log support ticket using component SBO-BC-SLD(attach all upgrade logs as mentioned below):

Mandatory Information required for SAP Business One Upgrade Incident .

Setup.SetupWizard.xxxxxxxx_xxxxxx.pidxxxx.log.csv - SetupLogFile of the Wizard with results of the pre&post upgrade checks
Setup.b1logger.xxxxxxxx_xxxxxx.pidxxxx.log.csv - SetupLogFile of the whole upgrade process
Setup.B1Setup.xxxxxxxx_xxxxxx.pidxxxx.log.csv - SetupLogFile of the whole upgrade process

Kind Regards
Nidhi 
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Failed to Update Outgoing Payments with Error Message...
entry.content:
Hi alou_cortez16

As for our experience this scenario and error are no more reproducible in version 10.0 SP 2308 and higher.

What is the exact version of SAP Business One you are using ?

Kind Regards
Nidhi
